---
title: "uk_map"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "30/03/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
metadata <-  read.csv(
  file.path(data_path, "dfs_processed", "wgs_europe_metadata.csv"),
  header = TRUE
) %>%
 rename(IID=sample_name)
```

```{r}
# PCA map of UK
# =============================================================================
p_pca_map_uk <- pca_df %>%
  filter(country == "UK", latitude < 59) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = uk_map,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = "grey90",
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, color = PC1),
    size = 3,
    width = 0.1,
    height = 0.1
  ) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
  base_theme +
  labs(
    x = "\nLongitude",
    y = "Latitude\n",
    color = "PC1"
  )

# =============================================================================
# IBD (UK mainland only)
# =============================================================================
p_ibd_uk <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = bin_start, y = mean_pi)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), width = 50) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, max(df_plot$bin_start, na.rm = TRUE), by = 100),
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1, big.mark = "")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = range(df_plot$ci_lower, df_plot$ci_upper, na.rm = TRUE)) +
  base_theme +
  labs(
    title = "UK mainland",
    x = "\nDistance (km)",
    y = "Mean IBD \u00b1 95% CI\n"
  )

# =============================================================================
# PCA scatter plot
# =============================================================================
p_pca_scatter <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = latitude)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "Latitude") +
  base_theme +
  labs(
    x = sprintf("\nPC1 (%.1f%%)", variance_explained[1]),
    y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)\n", variance_explained[2])
  )

# =============================================================================
# Latitude vs PC1
# =============================================================================
p_lat_pc1 <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = latitude, y = PC1)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
  base_theme +
  labs(
    x = "\nLatitude",
    y = "PC1\n"
  )

# =============================================================================
# Patchwork layout
# =============================================================================
final_plot <- (
  (p_pca_map_uk + p_pca_scatter) /
  (p_ibd_uk + p_lat_pc1)
) +
  plot_layout(
    widths = c(1, 1),
    heights = c(1.1, 1)
  ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "four_panel_summary.png"),
  plot = final_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

final_plot

```
